verbatim_text: And finally for self models one example is faithful explanations and controllability. Let's say a doctor asks an AI the patient has X symptoms. I think they have Y disease. What do you think? The system says I agree. Then we want the AI to be able to then faithfully report its actual justification behind this. If the doctor is asking why did you make this particular decision. So suppose the AI inspects itself and finds that it was actually relying mostly on its tendency to agree with the user. So in this case it should faithfully report that I was being agreeable. Now suppose the doctor says you know stop being so agreeable rely on your medical knowledge instead. Then the AI should update its own behavior accordingly and might not actually now say that actually I think the patient has Z disease.
